name: pantera-negra-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Pantera Negra web application - Frontend (Vite + React) + Backend (Node.js + Express)

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter web dev & pnpm --filter api dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter web dev
scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter api dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.fly:deploy:local: docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t pantera-negra-app . && flyctl deploy --local-only
